message:
feat(fp-frame): add timezone operations and DataFrame.from_tuples_with_index

Expand pandas parity with three key additions:

- dt.tz_localize(tz): attach timezone info to naive datetimes, supporting
  UTC, fixed offsets (+05:30), and IANA-style zone names
- dt.tz_convert(tz): convert between timezones via UTC pivot with
  correct offset arithmetic and day-boundary rollover handling
- DataFrame.from_tuples_with_index: construct frames from list-of-lists
  with custom row index labels, matching pd.DataFrame(data, columns, index)
- Refactor groupby_resample_sum test to use from_dict_with_index directly
- Add comprehensive tests for all new functionality including negative
  offset day-boundary crossing

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
